name: Titan Uranium Inc.
description: Titan Uranium Inc. was a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the uranium sector. The company aimed to become a leading mid-tier North American uranium producer, with a portfolio of assets including projects in the Athabasca Basin of Saskatchewan, Canada, and the Sheep Mountain uranium project in Wyoming, USA. Titan Uranium was publicly traded on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol TUE. In 2012, the company was acquired by Energy Fuels Inc. through a business combination, effectively ending its status as an independent exploration entity.
